entities.summary: Minimal usage example demonstrating the LLM API

detail.name: main
detail.description: Shows simplest possible usage: create LLM, call generate, print result.

takeaway.explain: A working minimal example teaches more than pages of docs. Show the happy path first, explain edge cases later.
takeaway.rationale: Shows simplest possible usage: create LLM, call generate, print result
takeaway.cross_lang: Rust doc tests (run in CI), Go Example functions, Python doctest, Java JUnit as docs
takeaway.gotcha: Examples rot when code changes — only CI-tested examples stay accurate
